items.name_en: Original Batch 【Model: 6151】❤️A selection of soft and durable full-grain leather totes. Features British House tartan fabric pieces, crafted by an Italian workshop. Clean and refined dimensions with multiple slip pockets and zip pockets. Gold metal base for protection. Includes adjustable top handle or detachable narrow shoulder strap; suitable for hand or crossbody. 26 x 12 x 21cm

items.name_en: Original: Burberry [Model: 6151] ❤️ A feminine tote bag made from selected soft and durable full-grain leather, paired with British worsted House tartan pieces, crafted by an Italian workshop. The clean and exquisite size design features multiple slip pockets and zip pockets. A gold metal base provides protection. This item comes with an adjustable handle or a detachable narrow strap, suitable for hand-carrying or crossbody wear. Dimensions: 26 x 12 x 21cm
